description_long: This is a dark, medieval-style helmet constructed primarily from metal, featuring a rounded dome with a pronounced central ridge running from front to back. The front of the helmet has a distinctive face guard with two eye openings and a vertical nose guard, providing both protection and visibility. Rivets and metal bands reinforce the structure, adding to its robust and utilitarian appearance. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with visible wear and subtle texturing that suggests age and use. There are no visible ventilation holes, decorative motifs, or modern features, giving it a functional, historical look. The interior is not visible, but it is likely lined with leather or fabric for comfort.
description: A dark, medieval metal helmet with a central ridge, face guard, and reinforced bands, showing a worn, utilitarian finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face guard with eye openings, nose guard, and central ridge.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded dome, central ridge, and side of the face guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded back and the continuation of the central ridge.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the dome, ridge, and side face guard.
